display.purpose: Hero headline. Left column of the two-column hero, wraps 2-3 lines by design; the accent line is Spectral italic in the theme accent. clamp(44px, 6vw, 88px), line-height 0.98.

section.purpose: Case-study section headlines, the case page H1, the footer 'Say hello' CTA. clamp(30px, 4vw, 52px).

statement.purpose: Declarative statement blocks (What I Do, How I Work, About). Inline emphasis is Spectral italic, same ink. clamp(26px, 3.1vw, 44px).

eyebrow.purpose: Accent section labels, nav links (muted), case-card metadata. 12px, 700 weight, 0.14em tracking, uppercase.

shadows.name: ambient-rest
shadows.purpose: Default soft shadow under case-study cards (light theme; dark theme uses 0 4px 24px rgba(0,0,0,0.25)).

shadows.name: ambient-hover
shadows.purpose: Deeper shadow on hover, paired with border-brightening (dark theme: 0 10px 34px rgba(0,0,0,0.34)).

shadows.name: status-glow
shadows.purpose: About live-status dot ring (light, soft terracotta ring since a real glow disappears on paper); dark theme uses a true mint glow 0 0 10px oklch(0.81 0.084 179).

motion.name: reveal
motion.purpose: Scroll-reveal entrance (gated on html.js, disabled under prefers-reduced-motion).

components.name: Chip
components.description: Secondary metadata tag on an inset surface (case-study Key Capabilities row).
components.css: .ds-chip { display: inline-block; background: var(--bg-inset); color: var(--text-tertiary); font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; padding: 7px 13px; border-radius: 100px; }

components.name: Case Study Card
components.description: Two-column card (~1.05fr/0.95fr): terracotta serif number, client, theme eyebrow, Spectral h3 title, italic driving question, 'View case study →' CTA, against a real screenshot on a fixed white mat. Ambient Rest shadow at rest; border + shadow deepen together on hover.
components.html:
01MoxiWorks·Organizational Complexity

Designing Brand Governance for Enterprise Scale

How do you help thousands of agents stay on brand without manual processes?

View case study →
components.css: .ds-case-card { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1.05fr 0.95fr; background: var(--bg-card); border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: 20px; overflow: hidden; text-decoration: none; color: inherit; box-shadow: var(--shadow-ambient-rest); transition: border-color 0.4s, box-shadow 0.4s; } .ds-case-card:hover { border-color: var(--border-bright); box-shadow: var(--shadow-ambient-hover); } .ds-case-card__body { padding: 48px 50px; } .ds-case-card__eyebrow { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.14em; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--text-muted); margin-bottom: 22px; } .ds-case-card__num { color: var(--accent-text); font-weight: 700; font-family: var(--font-display); } .ds-case-card__client { color: var(--text-bright); } .ds-case-card__title { margin: 0 0 18px; font-family: var(--font-display); font-size: clamp(1.75rem, 3.4vw, 2.75rem); font-weight: 500; color: var(--text-primary); } .ds-case-card__q { margin: 0 0 18px; font-size: clamp(1.0625rem, 1.6vw, 1.3125rem); font-style: italic; font-weight: 600; color: var(--text-secondary); } .ds-case-card__cta { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; font-size: 0.8125rem; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.14em; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--text-muted); } .ds-case-card__media { background: #fff; min-height: 420px; }

components.name: Hero CTA
components.description: Uppercase link with a bottom hairline that brightens to the theme accent on hover; the arrow nudges up-right.
components.css: .ds-hero-cta { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; padding: 22px 0 6px; font-size: 0.8125rem; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.14em; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--text-primary); text-decoration: none; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-bright); transition: color 0.3s, border-color 0.3s; } .ds-hero-cta:hover { color: var(--accent-text); border-color: var(--accent); } .ds-hero-cta__arrow { transition: transform 0.3s; } .ds-hero-cta:hover .ds-hero-cta__arrow { transform: translate(3px, -3px); }

components.name: Drenched Footer CTA
components.description: The one signature moment the page commits the accent to a full surface — oversized Spectral 'Say hello ↗' as display type on a solid accent field (terracotta light / mint dark) with near-black band ink.
components.css: .ds-footer-cta { display: inline-flex; align-items: baseline; gap: 16px; font-family: var(--font-display); font-weight: 500; font-size: clamp(2.75rem, 8vw, 7rem); color: var(--band-text); text-decoration: none; } .ds-footer-cta__arrow { transition: transform 0.3s; } .ds-footer-cta:hover .ds-footer-cta__arrow { transform: translate(4px, -4px); }

components.name: Navigation Link
components.description: Uppercase eyebrow-treatment nav link, muted → primary on hover, 44px tap box.
components.css: .ds-nav-link { font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.14em; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--text-muted); text-decoration: none; transition: color 0.3s; padding-block: 15px; margin-block: -15px; } .ds-nav-link:hover { color: var(--text-primary); }

narrative.overview: Warm paper (#F4F0E8) holds the page; a high-contrast serif carries every headline like a magazine feature; one terracotta accent is the only saturated color allowed to speak. Everything else — body copy, chips, borders — recedes into a tight warm-ink ramp. The system reads like a senior designer's editorial spread: generous whitespace, serif display doing the expressive work (with its italics carrying the emphasis), a single confident hue, and no decoration that doesn't serve hierarchy. This is the editorial iteration (adopted Jul 2026 from the 'Editorial Homepage' redesign). It replaces the earlier dark-default, mint/copper, Alegreya-Bricolage system. The content and information architecture are unchanged; the visual language is new. This system explicitly rejects the generic AI-template look: no purple gradients, no glassmorphism, no interchangeable hero sections, no cream-with-blue SaaS palette. Warmth is carried by the paper ground, the serif, and the terracotta — never by a tinted-near-white body that reads as 'AI beige.'
keyCharacteristics: Light by default, dark as sibling — :root holds the canonical light (paper) theme; [data-theme="dark"] is its dark counterpart, same type, same layouts, same single accent lifted for the dark ground.
One accent per theme — terracotta in light, the original signature mint in dark. Each theme carries a single saturated hue; never two on one screen.
Serif display / sans body on a real contrast axis — Spectral for every headline, statement, numeral, and the footer CTA; Hanken Grotesk for body, nav, and labels.
Italics as emphasis, the editorial way — the hero's accent line, inline company names, statement key-phrases, and codas are set in Spectral italic rather than bolded.
Flat-by-default surfaces with tonal layering + soft ambient shadows; hover brightens a border, not a fill.
Progressive enhancement: content is JS-rendered but pre-built into static HTML, reveals gate on html.js, a real <noscript> fallback ships, and all motion respects prefers-reduced-motion.

rules.name: The One Accent Rule
rules.body: Exactly one saturated color on any screen — terracotta in the light theme, signature mint in the dark. Never both at once, never a third hue. If a new UI need calls for 'another color,' the answer is a neutral from the ramp.

rules.name: The Serif-For-Scale Rule
rules.body: Spectral appears at display/section/statement scale, as serif numerals, and as the footer CTA. Body, UI, labels, and nav stay Hanken Grotesk. The two never trade roles.

rules.name: The Display-Weight Rule
rules.body: Big serif type stays at weight ~500 — Spectral's built-in contrast carries the elegance; don't bump display to 700/800 (that flattens it into a generic bold serif).

rules.name: The Italic-Emphasis Rule
rules.body: Lift a phrase with Spectral italic in the same ink, not with bold or color (the accent line is the one exception — italic and the accent hue).

rules.name: The Diffuse-Not-Dark Rule
rules.body: Shadows stay low-opacity, large-radius. A visible hard edge means the radius is too small and the opacity too high.

dos: Do keep exactly one accent per theme — terracotta in light (#B4542E / text #A6461F), signature mint in dark (#83D4C3 / text #97F8E4); everything else stays in the warm-neutral ramp, and the two hues never share a screen.
Do carry every headline in Spectral at weight ~500; emphasize phrases with Spectral italic, not bold.
Do treat light as the canonical theme and keep the dark sibling a faithful counterpart — same type and layouts; surfaces/ink/shadows invert and the accent shifts to its own theme's hue (mint).
Do step through the surface ramp (paper → card → inset) to convey depth before reaching for another color.
Do use the Ambient Rest / Ambient Hover pair for new card-level surfaces, paired with border-brightening.
Do write copy the way a senior designer talks to a peer — specific and confident, not marketing-voice.
donts: Don't introduce a second saturated accent (no purple, magenta, gradient) — breaks the One Accent Rule.
Don't let a theme show the other theme's accent — light is terracotta only, dark is mint only.
Don't bump display type to 700/800 to make it 'pop' — that flattens Spectral into a generic bold serif. Keep it ~500 and larger.
Don't use purple gradients, glassmorphism, cream-with-blue SaaS palettes, or stock-photo heroes — explicit anti-references.
Don't use hard, small-radius drop shadows (the '2014 app' look).
Don't add a third type family. Spectral + Hanken Grotesk are the committed pair.
Don't let muted/faint text fall below 4.5:1. --text-faint is decorative-only; never body copy.
Don't commit the local live-mode <script src="localhost:8400/live.js"> injection or leave ?v= cache tokens un-bumped when JS/CSS changes.
